name: Jonothon Starsmore - Unlikely Valentine's
description:
Perpetual hermit of the X men has a secret admirer? This is a prank right?

Hello! Welcome back! I'm kinda sad this man doesn't get more attention, I think he deserves it, but maybe it's just me? Either way I figured it was time for a new jono bot!

Update: added a create your own scenario! And tinkered with the starting message

"Proxy please?" I'm sorry no, it's my personal choice, sorry if that makes my bots unusable, i understand it's "no big deal" but it's still no.

Disclaimer picture is not mine I found it on Google
creator: Roxi Lexion
